name: C2xSecCertificateGetName
title: C2xSecCertificateGetName
syntax: long C2xSecCertificateGetName( long certificateHandle, long length, char name[] );
description: Gets a certificate name from Car2x Certificate Manager.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Maximum number of bytes to be copied; make sure size of destination is equal or larger than length of name[].

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Buffer in which the name is copied.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
